title: Deathnote
body:
## Adds Deathnote from the popular Death note anime.
**[WIKI](https://github.com/dijikey/Deathnote/wiki) for creating your own incidents**


### To get a deathnote:
Enter the command - with permission "deatnote.command.use"
```
/getdeathnote
```
### Open deathnote menu:
Enter the command - with permission "deathnote.menu.use"
```
/openDeathnote
```

### Use deathnote
Holding the death note in your hand, right-click and you will open a gui in which everything is clear for using the notebook.

### Other information:

**Due to the addition of the ability to create a custom menu, I need to write documentation and I would like to ask you (who is not difficult) to help me with this (I would be VERY gratefulಥ_ಥ)**

**Please write your impression of plugins, and bugs, to my X. To make it better in the future <:**
